summary: i18n implementation testing for RoutineTracker app. Found and fixed critical bug: ReferenceError 't is not defined' in Dashboard.jsx components (CategoryCard and MiniCalendar). After fix, all 4 languages (EN, PT, ES, DE) work correctly across Landing, Login, Dashboard, Customize, and Profile panels.

ui_bugs.issue: ReferenceError: t is not defined - CategoryCard component used t() function without importing useLanguage hook
ReferenceError: t is not defined - MiniCalendar component used t() function without importing useLanguage hook

action_items: AdminDashboard.jsx is NOT translated (hardcoded Portuguese) - this is expected per context notes, but should be addressed in future iteration if admin panel i18n is needed
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.jsx had two sub-components (CategoryCard and MiniCalendar) that used t() translation function without having access to useLanguage hook - fixed by adding const { t } = useLanguage() to each component
seed_data_creation: Created test users: i18ntest25088, i18ntest38872 for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: i18n implementation is complete and working. All 4 languages (EN, PT, ES, DE) translate correctly on: Landing page (hero, badge, CTA, features, footer), Login screen (tabs, labels, buttons, cloud-synced text, Google login), Dashboard (greeting, Focus Habit, Mood tracker, Progress, XP/Level, category cards, calendar), Customize panel (all sections), Profile panel (account, security, sign out). Language persists after page reload via localStorage key 'routinetracker_language'. AdminDashboard.jsx is intentionally NOT translated (admin panel is separate component with hardcoded Portuguese).

landing_page.EN: PASS - Build habits that stick, Get Started
landing_page.PT: PASS - Crie hábitos que duram, Começar
landing_page.ES: PASS - Crea hábitos que perduran, Empezar

login_screen.EN: PASS - Sign In, Sign Up, Password, Cloud-synced
login_screen.PT: PASS - Entrar, Cadastrar, Senha, Sincronizado na nuvem

i18n_test_results.language_persistence: PASS - German persisted after page reload
